message:
refactor(storage): extirpate rusqlite from production, harden atomic file writes

Move rusqlite to dev-dependencies; delete all remaining rusqlite-backed
production code:

Storage (sqlite.rs — ~300 lines removed):
- Delete LazyDb/LazyDbGuard structs (rusqlite lazy connection)
- Remove LazyDbError::OpenFailed variant (rusqlite-specific)
- Delete read_metadata_compat (rusqlite Row-based)
- Change MigrationError::Database from rusqlite::Error to FrankenError
- Consolidate check_schema_compatibility to FrankenConnection
- Remove duplicate IndexingCacheStorage for SqliteStorage impl
- PricingTable::load delegates to franken_load directly
- Remove ~10 dead rusqlite helper placeholders
- Update test helper param types to &FrankenConnection

Cargo.toml:
- Move rusqlite to [dev-dependencies] with comment about legacy tests

Atomic file replacement (indexer, config, sync):
- Replace remove+rename with backup-rename pattern (crash-safe)
- New unique_atomic_sidecar_path() helper (PID + timestamp + nonce)
  for collision-free .tmp/.bak/.backup files
- Tests for path uniqueness across calls

Other:
- lib.rs: remove LazyDbError::OpenFailed match arm, relax
  IndexingCacheStorage bound to ?Sized
- export.rs: let mut tx for FrankenSQLite transaction mutability
- key_management.rs: add RotateResult fields for audit trail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,9 +32,6 @@ which = "*"
 shell-words = "*"
 dotenvy = "*"
 notify = "*"
-rusqlite = { version = "*", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
-# FrankenSQLite foundation for staged storage migration (bead 300hj).
-# Keep rusqlite side-by-side during transition; migration code opts in explicitly.
 frankensqlite = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", package = "fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
@@ -120,6 +117,9 @@ backtrace = []
 vergen = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["build", "cargo"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+# rusqlite retained ONLY for test code: compat gate tests (C SQLite interop),
+# parity tests, and legacy migration safety tests. Zero production usage.
+rusqlite = { version = "*", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
 assert_cmd = "*"
 predicates = "*"
 insta = { version = "*", features = ["yaml", "json"] }

@@ -4531,13 +4531,6 @@ fn lazy_db_to_cli_error(e: crate::storage::sqlite::LazyDbError) -> CliError {
             hint: Some("Run 'cass index --full' to create the database.".into()),
             retryable: true,
         },
-        LazyDbError::OpenFailed { path, source } => CliError {
-            code: 9,
-            kind: "db-open",
-            message: format!("Failed to open database at {}: {source}", path.display()),
-            hint: None,
-            retryable: false,
-        },
         LazyDbError::FrankenOpenFailed { path, source } => CliError {
             code: 9,
             kind: "db-open",
@@ -9006,9 +8999,9 @@ fn run_doctor(
                 use frankensqlite::compat::{ConnectionExt as _, RowExt as _};
 
                 // Fix #115: Register the FTS5 virtual table so FrankenSQLite
-                // can see it.  Without this, databases created by stock
-                // rusqlite have rootpage=0 for virtual tables and
-                // FrankenSQLite's sqlite_master parsing silently skips them.
+                // can see it.  Without this, databases created by C SQLite
+                // have rootpage=0 for virtual tables and FrankenSQLite's
+                // sqlite_master parsing silently skips them.
                 if let Err(e) = crate::storage::sqlite::register_fts5_on_connection(&conn) {
                     tracing::debug!(
                         error = %e,
